hero.title: Kwinjira muri IATF
hero.lead: Kuba umunyamuryango biruguruye. Hari uburyo bwinshi bwo kwitabira, waba wishingikiriza ku ikoranabuhanga rifasha, kubaka porogaramu iboneka, guhindura, kugerageza, cyangwa kubungabunga umushinga. Ibiganiro n'ibyemezo bibaho mu ruhame kuri GitHub na Discord.

items: Saba gukora umushinga runaka. Niba uhuye n'inzitizi yo kugera ku buryo bushobora gukemurwa na software rusange y'isoko ryuguruye, yohereze binyuze mu kwakira ibyifuzo.
Gupima no gusuzuma. Gerageza imishinga ya IATF ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga rifasha ukoresha, utange raporo y'ibikora n'ibidakora, kandi ushyire ibibazo mububiko bukwiye.
Jya uhindura. Ibisobanuro by'umwimerere bisohoka mu cyongereza cyoroshye mbere. Impinduro ziyongera uko abaterankunga baboneka, uhereye ku cyesipanyoli.
Jya wubaka. Fata ibibazo mububiko bwose bwa IATF, wohereze ibyifuzo byo gukuramo, cyangwa fata umushinga nk'umwenjeniyeri ubishinzwe.
Jya ukomeza. Imishinga ihari rimwe na rimwe ikenera umukozi mushya. Guhinduranya umukozi ni igice gisanzwe cy'icyitegererezo, ntabwo ari akarusho.
Urubuga rwa GitHub. Ibibazo, gukuramo ibyifuzo, ibyatangajwe, n'inyandiko z'umushinga.
Gushyamirana. Kuganira mu buryo butaziguye, guhuza ibitekerezo no kubaza ibibazo mu buryo bufatiweho.
Kohererezanya ubutumwa kuri interineti. Gukoresha contact@iatf.cc niba nta GitHub na Discord bihuye.

header.title: Hitamo umuyoboro uhwanye n'uburyo ushaka gutanga umusanzu

paragraphs: Imiyoboro yose ijya mu isuzuma rusange rimwe no mu bubiko rusange bumwe.
